requests.name: spot-lamp
requests.prompt: A single striped orange bubble pendant lamp hanging from a black cord, glowing warmly, isolated spot illustration on a plain warm cream background, nothing else in frame.

requests.name: spot-reports
requests.prompt: A neat stack of printed audit reports and spec sheets on a plain warm cream background, top page showing dense typewritten text with a few red-ink margin marks, isolated spot illustration, nothing else in frame.

requests.name: spot-desk
requests.prompt: A small cobalt-blue writing desk with a black typewriter and one open printed report, a simple wooden chair, isolated spot illustration on a plain warm cream background, nothing else in frame.
